candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:
Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$
Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$
When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the following reaction occurs. What will happen in the salt bridge as the reaction progresses?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: The Na$^+$ ions will flow to the Cu/Cu$^+$ half-cell.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
两个半电池设置如下：

半电池 A：$\text{Cu}^{2+}(\text{aq})$ 溶液中的铜条 $\text{Cu}(\text{s})$

半电池 B：$\text{Zn}^{2+}(\text{aq})$ 溶液中的锌条 $\text{Zn}(\text{s})$

当两个半电池通过盐桥连接时，会发生以下反应。随着反应的进行，盐桥中会发生什么现象？

A. $\text{Na}^+$ 离子将流向 $\text{Cu}^{2+}/\text{Cu}$ 半电池。
B. $\text{Br}^-$ 离子将流向 $\text{Cu}^{2+}/\text{Cu}$ 半电池。
C. 电子将从 $\text{Cu}^{2+}/\text{Cu}$ 半电池转移到 $\text{Zn}^{2+}/\text{Zn}$ 半电池。
D. 电子将从 $\text{Zn}^{2+}/\text{Zn}$ 半电池转移到 $\text{Cu}^{2+}/\text{Cu}$ 半电池。
metadata.explanation_zh: 电子不会通过盐桥转移,因此选项(C)和(D)被排除。随着反应的进行,铜半电池中[$Cu^+$]浓度降低,为了维持半电池内的电荷平衡,正电荷的钠离子($Na^+$)会从盐桥转移进入该半电池。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The sample is semantically understandable. The text states the half-cells, while the diagram clearly supplies the salt bridge composition (NaBr) and the reaction direction, which are needed to infer ion flow. The expected answer is understandable, though the open-ended wording could also invite mention of the counterion movement.
